infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Meeting Intelligence captures your microphone so meeting audio can be transcribed locally before any data leaves your machine.
infoPlist.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: Meeting Intelligence captures the audio from your meetings (Zoom, Teams, Meet, etc.) via macOS screen capture so the conversation can be transcribed.
infoPlist.NSScreenRecordingUsageDescription: Meeting Intelligence needs screen recording access to capture system audio from meetings — only audio is read; the screen image is discarded.
